summary: Phase 11 Feature Testing Complete - Notification System & Share Packed Box Images. All features verified working: Persistent notifications with acknowledge, bell icon navigation, Share All Images (renamed), Share Packed Box Images (new button), role-based visibility.
seed_data_creation: Created test notifications via POST /api/notifications during testing
context_for_next_testing_agent: Phase 11 features verified: 1) Notification system with POST/GET/PUT endpoints working, idempotent by order_id+type. 2) TelecallerDashboard shows notification box with ScrollArea, Packed/Dispatched badges, clickable order links, thumbs-up acknowledge buttons. 3) Bell icon in header shows count and navigates to dashboard. 4) OrderDetail page has 'Share All Images' (renamed from 'Share Images') and 'Share Packed Box Images' buttons visible only for admin/telecaller roles. 5) Packaging role correctly cannot see share buttons.

notification_backend.POST /api/notifications: PASS - Creates notification, idempotent by order_id+type
notification_backend.GET /api/notifications: PASS - Returns unacknowledged notifications for current user
notification_backend.GET /api/orders/my-notifications: PASS - Returns packed/dispatched orders for telecaller

notification_frontend.notification_box: PASS - Visible on telecaller dashboard when notifications exist
notification_frontend.scroll_area: PASS - Fixed height with scrollable content using ScrollArea component
notification_frontend.notification_structure: PASS - Shows Packed/Dispatched badge, clickable order number, customer name, thumbs-up button
notification_frontend.acknowledge_button: PASS - Clicking thumbs-up removes notification from list
notification_frontend.bell_icon: PASS - Shows count badge, navigates to dashboard on click

share_buttons.share_all_images: PASS - Button renamed from 'Share Images' to 'Share All Images'
share_buttons.share_packed_box_images: PASS - New button visible when packed box images exist
share_buttons.role_visibility: PASS - Buttons only visible for admin/telecaller roles, hidden for packaging
